calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-02-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Central Indiana OB/GYN, LLC or Roger Jones.
Amended Defaults were entered against defendants on September 10, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 1, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at the default prove-up hearing was filed on September 23, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Central Indiana OB/GYN, LLC and Roger Jones as follows:

Damages/Principal - $228,649.78.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,782.20.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $475.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $240,406.98.

It is further ordered that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the following leased equipment: one Cutera XEO Full System Console, and one Titan Application - XL.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
